question_en: How is central banking described in this unit?
choices_en: As a concentration of power within the monetary hierarchy
As a neutral observer outside money
As a purely technical improvement without political meaning
choices_ko: 정치적 의미 없는 순수 기술 개선으로
explanation_en: The unit portrays central banking as concentrating monetary power within the layered system.
explanation_ko: 이 단위는 중앙은행을 레이어 구조 안의 통화 권력 집중으로 묘사한다.
